closeCalls.question: Confirmation: Kara Marie Westercamp, of Virginia, to be a Judge of the U.S. Court of International Trade — On the Nomination
Motion to Invoke Cloture: Benjamin M. Flowers to be U.S. Circuit Judge for the Sixth Circuit — On the Cloture Motion
Motion to Proceed to S.J. Res. 198 — On the Motion to Proceed
Motion to Invoke Cloture: Kara Marie Westercamp to be a Judge of the U.S. Court of International Trade — On the Cloture Motion
Motion to Invoke Cloture: Motion to Proceed to S. 4784 — On Cloture on the Motion to Proceed
closeCalls.result: Cloture on the Motion to Proceed Rejected (50-46, 3/5 majority required)
